ModMetadata.Name: Spray Paint Plus [StationeersLaunchPad]
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Spray Paint Plus[/h1]
Combines color cycling, network painting, and infinite spray paint into one mod with full multiplayer support.
[h2]Features[/h2] [list] [*]Scroll wheel to cycle spray can colors [*]Spray paints entire pipe/cable/chute networks [*]Hold Shift to paint single item (or swap with config) [*]Hold Ctrl for checkered pattern [*]Infinite spray paint uses (configurable) [*]No spray paint pollution (configurable) [*]All settings configurable via mod settings panel [*]Full multiplayer support — all players must have this mod installed [/list]
[h2]Requirements[/h2] [list] [*][url=https://docs.bepinex.dev/]BepInEx[/url] [*][url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad]StationeersLaunchPad[/url] [/list]
[h2]Incompatible With[/h2] [list] [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3163662298]Color Cycler[/url] by Elmotrix [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2876605527]Network Painter[/url] by Elmotrix [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3576112002]Infinite Spray Paint[/url] by Aspct (redundant — disable to avoid confusion) [/list]
[h2]Credits[/h2] Built on the work of Elmotrix (Color Cycler, Network Painter), SubHobo (multiplayer networking), Aspct (Infinite Spray Paint), and Dingo (original Infinite Paint).
[url=https://github.com/SixFive7/SprayPaintPlus]Source Code on GitHub[/url]
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Spray Paint Plus Combines color cycling, network painting, and infinite spray paint into one mod. Features: - Scroll wheel to cycle spray can colors - Spray paints entire pipe/cable/chute networks - Hold Shift to paint single item (or swap with config) - Hold Ctrl for checkered pattern - Infinite spray paint uses (configurable) - No spray paint pollution (configurable) Settings: All features are configurable via the mod settings panel. Server settings control gameplay for all players. Client settings (scroll direction, single/network default) are personal. Requirements: BepInEx + StationeersLaunchPad Multiplayer: All players must have this mod installed. Incompatible with: Color Cycler, Network Painter. Disable Infinite Spray Paint too if installed (redundant).
